info.title: MDIA API
info.description: API documentation for Mbaise Diaspora in the Americas application

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an authentication token

leader.description: Present when this user is an organization leader

items.example: The email field is required.

get.description: Returns the details of the currently authenticated user

leader.description: Present when this user is an organization leader

get.description: Retrieve payment statistics for the authenticated member including totals and breakdowns by payment type and year
Retrieve comprehensive payment statistics for administrators including member counts, totals, and detailed breakdowns. Accessible by Admin, Super Admin, Treasurer, and Financial Secretary only.

message.example: Unauthorized. You do not have permission to validate payments.

get.description: Returns organization leaders visible on the public about page. No authentication required.

icon.description: IcoFont class for the public site

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of members. Search by name, email, or phone.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search members by name, email, or phone

leader.description: Organization leadership record when this member is a leader

post.description: Create a new member with auto-generated password

message.example: The email has already been taken.

items.example: The email has already been taken.

get.description: Returns up to 10 members matching by name or email. Requires at least 2 characters in query.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query (min 2 characters; returns empty if omitted or shorter)

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific member by UUID

leader.description: Organization leadership record when this member is a leader

put.description: Update the profile information of a specific member

message.example: The email has already been taken.

items.example: The email has already been taken.

delete.description: Permanently delete a member. Super Admin only. Cannot delete Super Admin users.

403.description: Forbidden - Super Admin only or cannot delete Super Admin

post.description: Generate a new random password for a member. Super Admin only. Cannot regenerate for Super Admin users.

member.description: Updated member with roles and payments

403.description: Forbidden - Super Admin only or cannot regenerate for Super Admin

message.example: Cannot regenerate password for Super Admin from dashboard.

put.description: Allows an authenticated member to update their own profile

message.example: The phone has already been taken.

items.example: The phone has already been taken.

post.description: Change the authenticated user password. Requires current password for verification.

422.description: Current password incorrect or validation failed

post.description: Submit a payment on behalf of authenticated member with evidence files. Status is automatically set to pending until verified.

evidence_files.description: Optional payment evidence (receipts, screenshots). JPG, PNG, WEBP, PDF. Max 2MB each.

message.example: The payment type uuid field is required.

items.example: The selected payment type uuid is invalid.
The evidence files field is required.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all payments with optional filters. Accessible by Admin, Super Admin, Treasurer, and Financial Secretary only.

parameters.name: payment_type_uuid
parameters.description: Filter payments by payment type UUID

message.example: Unauthorized. You do not have permission to validate payments.

post.summary: Log a payment on behalf of a member
post.description: Create a payment directly on behalf of a member. Status is automatically set to verified. Accessible by Admin, Super Admin, Treasurer, and Financial Secretary only.

message.example: Unauthorized. You do not have permission to validate payments.
The user uuid field is required.

items.example: The selected user uuid is invalid.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific payment including evidence files. Accessible by Admin, Super Admin, Treasurer, and Financial Secretary only.

message.example: Unauthorized. You do not have permission to validate payments.

put.description: Verify a payment that was submitted by a member. Sets status to verified and records verification timestamp. Accessible by Admin, Super Admin, Treasurer, and Financial Secretary only.

message.example: Unauthorized. You do not have permission to validate payments.
